preserved_evidence: Filename/title identify DOW-UAP-D33, Mission Report, Greece, October 2023

preserved_evidence: DVIDS PR34 identifies filename DOD_111689011 and accompanying report DoW-UAP-D33
implication: D33/PR34 is a hard media-plus-report case.

preserved_evidence: Initial contact is 270035:12ZOCT23; DoD acquisition date is 270035:00ZOCT23

preserved_evidence: USCENTCOM / 603rd; AFSOC / 33 SOS; ISR mission; LGLR takeoff and OJMS landing; target pod AN/DAS-4; primary sensor FMV

preserved_evidence: Report primary sensor FMV and available sensor G-MESH; PR34 video shows sensor tracking, reticle designation, contrast filtering, and loss against background

preserved_evidence: Seemingly circular, too small to make out details; flying just above ocean surface
implication: Use as morphology/setting lane, not size/altitude measurement.

preserved_evidence: Report says multiple 90-degree turns; structured field says sharp 90-degree turns
analytic_status: strong report claim; partially image-plane supported
implication: Manual track supports apparent heading changes, not true real-world turn geometry.
Do not independently validate physical speed without FOV, range, platform motion, and telemetry.

preserved_evidence: First and last coordinates preserve redacted 35SKD lanes with radius 5 and estimated accuracy
implication: Useful lane-level geospatial evidence, but exact coordinates are redacted.

preserved_evidence: Observer assessment benign; no observer engagement; no effects on persons/equipment; no recovered material; under intelligent control marked NO
implication: Supports unresolved benign observation lane; does not close sensor/platform explanations.

preserved_evidence: Local manual review retained 97 accepted marks from 4.0s-59.0s and identified seven smoothed image-plane heading changes >=60 deg
implication: Supports apparent maneuvering in the public MP4; not proof of physical 90-degree turns.

preserved_evidence: Public report/video lack source FOV, slant range, platform/gimbal motion, raw telemetry, size, and exact track data
implication: Keep 80 MPH and true turn geometry report-derived unless source telemetry appears.
